title: AAA Wunder tangent
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] AAA Wunder [tangent] Post by Azathoth » Thu Nov 29, 2012 5:24 am NemZ wrote: They do all seem to blame him for the impact but nobody's giving him any credit for stopping the angel before that, which pretty much required him to go all super mode on it.

[]: Post by Ramiel² » Thu Nov 29, 2012 5:37 am Azathoth wrote: killing angels to protect the human race is literally his only responsibility. guess which half of this responsibility he failed catastrophically and willfully to fulfill In general I am inclined to forgive Wille personnel and Misato for treating him pretty curtly, since they have plenty of problems to deal with entirely independent of him and especially since the kid has been so often disinclined to pilot Eva in the past that you'd kind of expect him to stop piloting as soon as he's no longer being forced to. If they're guilty of any mistreatment of Shinji it's probably that they don't lock him up, creating an opportunity for a mentally unstable kid to go running off with whoever happens along promising him that everything will be alright if he just presses the big red button

[]: Post by NemZ » Thu Nov 29, 2012 5:38 am Azathoth wrote: killing angels to protect the human race is literally his only responsibility. guess which half of this responsibility he failed catastrophically and willfully to fulfill

[]: Post by Azathoth » Thu Nov 29, 2012 5:44 am NemZ wrote: It's not like he WANTED to start an impact at the end of 2.22 or that he had any idea at all that was even possible.

[]: Post by Ramiel² » Thu Nov 29, 2012 6:04 am If you want to discuss this further please come to this Thread. http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13412/SPOILERS-Misatos-relationship-with-Shinji-in-30/80/ Before we all get a tempban..

Article: AAA Wunder tangent
[]: [SPOILERS] AAA Wunder [tangent] Post by Azathoth » Thu Nov 29, 2012 5:24 am NemZ wrote: They do all seem to blame him for the impact but nobody's giving him any credit for stopping the angel before that, which pretty much required him to go all super mode on it.

[]: Post by Ramiel² » Thu Nov 29, 2012 5:37 am Azathoth wrote: killing angels to protect the human race is literally his only responsibility. guess which half of this responsibility he failed catastrophically and willfully to fulfill In general I am inclined to forgive Wille personnel and Misato for treating him pretty curtly, since they have plenty of problems to deal with entirely independent of him and especially since the kid has been so often disinclined to pilot Eva in the past that you'd kind of expect him to stop piloting as soon as he's no longer being forced to. If they're guilty of any mistreatment of Shinji it's probably that they don't lock him up, creating an opportunity for a mentally unstable kid to go running off with whoever happens along promising him that everything will be alright if he just presses the big red button

[]: Post by NemZ » Thu Nov 29, 2012 5:38 am Azathoth wrote: killing angels to protect the human race is literally his only responsibility. guess which half of this responsibility he failed catastrophically and willfully to fulfill

[]: Post by Azathoth » Thu Nov 29, 2012 5:44 am NemZ wrote: It's not like he WANTED to start an impact at the end of 2.22 or that he had any idea at all that was even possible.

[]: Post by Ramiel² » Thu Nov 29, 2012 6:04 am If you want to discuss this further please come to this Thread. http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13412/SPOILERS-Misatos-relationship-with-Shinji-in-30/80/ Before we all get a tempban..
